humanEffortEstimate.rationale: Comprehensive STRIDE threat model covering 6 STRIDE categories with 30 threats identified across control plane, data plane, and 9 trust boundaries. Full security requirements specification with 57 requirements mapped to OWASP ASVS v4.0 and NIST CSF 2.0. Attack tree analysis, HTTP security header policy definition, SRI requirements, and security testing plan. Complexity driven by multi-tenant SaaS architecture with SSH key management and Docker orchestration — high-security domain requiring deep analysis of remote code execution surfaces.
